channel.title: Auction-Market-Theory on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Auction-Market-Theory on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio

item.title: 002 — SPY 0DTE 700P | Overnight High Failure
item.description: Bought 1 SPY 0DTE put after a failed breakout above the overnight high with no acceptance. +70% gain. Missed the reversal long after close.
